results.title: Arvostatin 'call 111' warning as NHS issues 'serious' side effects list
results.description: Those taking the cholesterol busting statin can sometimes suffer serious side-effects

results.title: CUT Calls Out «Outrageous» Statement by Government Labor Panel Expert David Bravo
results.description: El Ciudadano Original article: “Cada persona es un cacho”: CUT califica de indignante declaración de asesor «experto» de la mesa laboral del Gobierno Controversial Statement by Labor Reactivation Expert “Every person is a burden”. This was the shocking statement made by economist David Bravo, head of the Labor Reactivation Panel, referring to workers in a corporate context [...] La entrada CUT Calls Out «Outrageous» Statement by Government Labor Panel Expert David Bravo se publicó primero en El Ciudadano .
